mnemonics: CIA - Continuous Internal Assessment: Think of it as the 'Central Intelligence Agency' for your OS course, constantly gathering data on your performance to ensure system (student) security and success.
keyPoints: It is a form of formative assessment conducted throughout the module.
Its purpose is to evaluate understanding and provide feedback before the final summative exam.
It often includes components like quizzes, assignments, or small projects related to Operating Systems fundamentals.
commonMistakes: Confusing it with the final exam or a single high-stakes test.
Procrastinating on CIE tasks because they 'don't count as much,' leading to a poor overall grade.
Not using the feedback provided to identify and improve on weak areas in the subject.
